3209060.name: CLOWNOUT
3209060.description:
CLOWNOUT - Smash or Dash!

Clowns vs. humans. Rabbits vs. clowns. What could possibly be crazier?
Only this game of chase-tag, hammer-smashers, and pure chaotic fun.
Enough joking around - the clowns are done clowning. Now they’ve got sledgehammers, and they're aiming straight for the pranksters’ skulls.

But the pranksters came prepared - cakes, traps, and brooms! Not for cleaning, of course, but for chaotic quidditch-style takedowns and mid-air madness.
Tons of wild game modes await - for glory, for chaos, or just for the sheer joy of being ridiculous.
Join the madness. What are you waiting for? The clown is already on his way. 🚨

Rules? Simple as 2+2 (unless you're a clown):

Clowns get 60 seconds to catch a human with their hammer - or they're out.
Catch someone? Swap roles. Now you're the clown.
The fun doesn’t stop until one player is left standing… or sobbing in laughter.

But that’s just the beginning.
Carry logs to build a raft.
Steal candy from clowns.
Enter DeathMatch.
Die creatively in under 60 seconds.
And yes - that might count as a win.

Play across 10 unique maps packed with traps, secrets, and delightful insanity:

  • Build a raft and escape - before the clowns close in!

  • Find and devour 16 candies… without exploding - too sweet to survive?

  • Eliminate as many pranksters or clowns as possible - the hunt begins.

  • Die in 60 seconds - and do it with style.

  • …and many other chaotic modes no serious game would dare include.

Oh, and did we mention the giant clown who drops in to “restore order” on the map?
Yeah. That’s a thing. He’s huge. He’s angry. And he’s got opinions.

Key Features:

  • Up to 6 players in online mayhem.

  • 10 handcrafted maps full of secrets, hazards, and humor.

  • Multiple game modes: from classic catch-and-swap to pure nonsense carnage.

  • Insane abilities: traps, teleportation, disguise as random objects, balloon flight, broomsticks - yes, actual broomsticks.

  • A world where chaos is an art form, and laughter is your only escape.

CLOWNOUT isn’t just a game.
It’s a multiplayer madhouse where you either laugh, or get hammered (literally).
Choose your side - or just start the riot.
3209060.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
